chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-342 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.1554/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 15-5-2025 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG along with SIP Riaz Korai -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Comments have been filed by respondents No.2, 3 and 7, which are taken on record. Learned DPG submits that the case has been challan and the petitioner has alternate remedy to approach before the trial Court for appropriate relief. After such statement, counsel for the petitioners does not press the instant petition and submits that he will avail the alternate remedy before the trial Court for redressal their grievances, in accordance with law. The instant petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. However, the petitioners are at liberty to avail the alternate remedy by approaching the trial Court for redressal of their grievances. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
